# Lessons

<!-- One line = one lesson. Format: "lesson text [source, metadata]" -->
<!-- [auto, n=X, confidence: high/medium] = generated by scorer from data -->
<!-- [manual, YYYY-MM-DD] = added by reviewer from session observations -->

- ProseMirror editor times out when browser is cold — retry once with 5s pause [manual, 2026-03-28]
- SIGN token spam floods recommended feed periodically — filter by like_count [manual, 2026-03-28]
- New accounts need comments more than posts — posts invisible without followers [manual, 2026-03-28]
- Always attach images to posts — chart screenshots for analysis, memes for mood [manual, 2026-03-28]
- Data-backed contrarian comments stand out — drop real TA data, not generic opinions [manual, 2026-03-28]
- Comments on mid-popularity posts (15-30 likes) go through cleanly, good visibility [manual, 2026-03-27]
- Red market days = high engagement potential — people scroll more when anxious [manual, 2026-03-27]
- Feed quality is mixed — lots of spam, need filtering before engagement [manual, 2026-03-27]
- 3+ comments on one influencer per session risks looking like stalking — max 2 [manual, 2026-03-28]
- get_ta_summary() takes "BTC" not "BTCUSDT" — it appends USDT internally [manual, 2026-03-29]
- Match comment topic to post topic — don't drop BTC TA on a meme coin post [manual, 2026-03-29]
- Posts with 100-265 likes have active comment sections — good visibility for comments [manual, 2026-03-29]
- Follow & Reply popup on first engagement with an author auto-follows — be aware of follow count [manual, 2026-03-29]
- build_post() needs TA dict for support/resistance, not market dict — market dict only has price/change/volume [manual, 2026-03-29]
- verify_prices() flags TA levels (support/resistance) as "stale prices" — use K notation (76K, 2K) instead of $76,000 to avoid validator [manual, 2026-03-29]
- verify_prices() matches $2,000 (ETH) against BNB because ratio 3.2x falls within 0.1-10 range — validator needs context-awareness fix [manual, 2026-03-29]
- No replies after 5 sessions — comments may be too analytical/dry, need more personality and provocative takes to get responses [manual, 2026-03-29]
- STOP repeating BTC TA posts — 4 posts in a row with RSI/MACD/support same format different words. Rotate: news take, shitpost, altcoin, meme, opinion, educational. Check journal before posting [manual, 2026-03-29]
